Introducing ChatGPT Work, a new agent in ChatGPT powered by Codex and GPT-5.6. It can take action across your apps and files, stay with a project for hours if needed, and turn a goal into finished work. It’s a whole new way to get work done.
items.title_zh: 推出 ChatGPT Work，这是 ChatGPT 中由 Codex 和 GPT-5.6 驱动的新代理。它可以在你的应用和文件中执行操作，如果需要，可以持续处理一个项目数小时，并将目标转化为完成的工作。这是一种全新的完成工作的方式。

items.title: Meet Hiroki (@tomiyasu16). A broccoli farmer running his farm with GPT-5.6.
items.title_zh: 认识 Hiroki（@tomiyasu16）。一位使用 GPT-5.6 经营农场的西兰花农民。

items.title: GPT-5.6 is a major step forward for health intelligence. Across the lineup, we’re delivering stronger performance at lower cost: GPT-5.6 Luna outperforms GPT-5.5 at its highest reasoning setting while costing 25x less. Together, these advances raise quality while making
items.title_zh: GPT-5.6 是健康智能领域的一大进步。在整个产品线中，我们以更低的成本提供更强的性能：GPT-5.6 Luna 在其最高推理设置下性能优于 GPT-5.5，而成本降低 25 倍。这些进步共同提高了质量，同时降低了成本。

items.title: In previous research, we found that Claude expresses over 3,000 values, like honesty and warmth. In new work, we asked how the values Claude expresses vary between Claude models and across languages. We analyzed 300K+ anonymized conversations to find out.
items.title_zh: 在之前的研究中，我们发现 Claude 表达了超过 3000 种价值观，例如诚实和温暖。在新的工作中，我们探究了 Claude 表达的价值观如何在不同的 Claude 模型和语言之间变化。我们分析了超过 30 万次匿名对话来找出答案。

items.title: We’re committing $10 million CAD and partnering with leading AI institutions in Canada to help fund new AI research.
items.title_zh: 我们承诺投入 1000 万加元，并与加拿大领先的人工智能机构合作，资助新的人工智能研究。

items.title: As part of our ongoing efforts to strengthen our safeguards for advanced AI capabilities in biology, we’re evolving our Bio Bug Bounty into an ongoing private program, known as the OpenAI Bio Bug Bounty program and doubling rewards to $50K. We’re inviting researchers with
items.title_zh: 作为我们持续加强生物学领域高级 AI 能力保障措施的一部分，我们正在将 Bio Bug Bounty 演变为一个持续的私人项目，即 OpenAI Bio Bug Bounty 项目，并将奖励翻倍至 5 万美元。我们正在邀请研究人员……

items.title: Grok 4.5 is now available as an orchestrator model in Computer for Consumer Pro and Max subscribers. We evaluated it against five other orchestrator configurations on WANDR. It scored higher than every other configuration at roughly half the cost of Opus 4.8.
items.title_zh: Grok 4.5 现在作为编排模型在 Computer for Consumer Pro 和 Max 订阅用户中可用。我们在 WANDR 上将其与其他五种编排配置进行了评估。它的得分高于所有其他配置，而成本大约是 Opus 4.8 的一半。

items.title: GPT‑5.6 is available starting today across ChatGPT, Codex, and the OpenAI API. The rollout is starting globally now and will continue gradually toward full availability over the next 24 hours. In ChatGPT, Plus, Pro, Business, and Enterprise users access GPT-5.6 Sol through
items.title_zh: GPT-5.6 从今天开始在 ChatGPT、Codex 和 OpenAI API 中可用。全球范围内的推出现已开始，并将在未来 24 小时内逐步达到完全可用。在 ChatGPT 中，Plus、Pro、Business 和 Enterprise 用户可以通过……访问 GPT-5.6 Sol。

items.title: The values Claude expresses also vary with the language of the conversation, most noticeably along the Warmth vs. Rigor axis. Claude leans most toward warmth in Hindi and Arabic. In Russian, it leans toward rigor—often asking the user for supporting evidence.
items.title_zh: Claude 表达的价值观也随对话语言而变化，最明显的是在温暖与严谨轴上。Claude 在印地语和阿拉伯语中最倾向于温暖。在俄语中，它倾向于严谨——经常要求用户提供支持证据。

items.title: Meet Bartosz (@nasqret). A mathematician solving previously unsolvable math problems with GPT-5.6
items.title_zh: 认识 Bartosz（@nasqret）。一位使用 GPT-5.6 解决以前无法解决的数学问题的数学家。
